products.name: Wingback Elegance
products.detail: The Wingback Elegance chair features distinctive side panels and a high back that provide excellent head and neck support. Upholstered in premium velvet with button tufting details, this traditional design includes carved wooden legs and brass nailhead trim. Perfect for creating a sophisticated reading nook or accent piece.

products.name: Scandinavian Dining
products.detail: The Scandinavian Dining chair embodies Nordic simplicity with its clean lines and natural wood construction. Featuring a contoured seat for ergonomic comfort and angled legs for stability, this chair is crafted from sustainable oak wood with a smooth matte finish. Ideal for modern dining spaces seeking functional elegance.

products.name: Executive Leather
products.detail: The Executive Leather chair delivers superior comfort and professional style for home offices and corporate settings. Features genuine bonded leather upholstery, lumbar support cushioning, 360-degree swivel, and pneumatic height adjustment. Chrome-finished five-star base with smooth-rolling casters ensures mobility and durability.

products.name: Café Bistro
products.detail: The Café Bistro chair brings industrial chic to any dining space with its powder-coated metal frame and vintage-inspired design. Stackable for easy storage, featuring a curved backrest for comfort and cross-brace construction for strength. Available in multiple colors to complement various interior styles.

products.name: Velvet Accent
products.detail: The Velvet Accent chair adds a touch of glamour with its plush velvet upholstery and gold-finished metal legs. Featuring a deep seat, curved armrests, and channel tufting on the backrest, this piece combines Art Deco elegance with modern comfort. A stunning focal point for bedrooms or living rooms.

products.name: Ergonomic Mesh
products.detail: The Ergonomic Mesh chair prioritizes comfort and health with its breathable mesh backrest and contoured seat cushion. Features adjustable lumbar support, armrests, and seat height with tilt tension control. Designed to promote proper posture during extended work sessions, ideal for home offices and workspaces.

products.name: Rattan Bohemian
products.detail: The Rattan Bohemian chair brings organic texture and relaxed style with its handwoven natural rattan construction. Featuring a rounded peacock-style back, comfortable seat cushion, and sturdy wooden frame, this chair adds coastal or boho charm to any space. Perfect for sunrooms, patios, or eclectic interiors.

products.name: Modern Barrel
products.detail: The Modern Barrel chair features a distinctive rounded silhouette with enveloping sides that create a cozy cocoon effect. Upholstered in soft boucle fabric with a 360-degree swivel base, this chair offers both style and functionality. Black powder-coated metal legs provide a sleek contrast to the plush upholstery.

products.name: Gaming Pro
products.detail: The Gaming Pro chair delivers competitive edge with its racing-inspired design and premium features. Includes adjustable lumbar pillow, headrest cushion, 4D armrests, and full recline capability up to 180 degrees. Heavy-duty nylon base and smooth PU casters support intense gaming sessions with maximum comfort.

products.name: Classic Windsor
products.detail: The Classic Windsor chair honors centuries of craftsmanship with its distinctive spindle back and saddle-shaped seat. Handcrafted from solid hardwood with turned legs and stretchers, this timeless design adds warmth and character to dining rooms and kitchens. Available in various wood finishes to match traditional or farmhouse décor.
